pi_items.verified_value: Fabricated/synthetic positions not matching actual Hurricane Katrina track
pi_items.source: Comparison to NOAA best track shows these points deviate significantly from real Katrina positions; points appear to be synthetic intermediate waypoints created for pedagogical purposes

privileged_info_summary: The Hurricane Katrina track dataset in this task is SYNTHETIC data created by the setup script, not downloaded from a public data source. The first two data points (Aug 23 18:00 and Aug 24 12:00) are exact matches to real NOAA Hurricane Katrina best track coordinates. Point 3 (26.0°N, -79.0°W) is an approximation of the real Aug 25 12:00 position (26.2°N, -79.0°W). Points 4-8 are fabricated intermediate positions not corresponding to actual Hurricane Katrina track data. The actual cumulative track distance is 21.57 degrees (2401.6 km), not the claimed 22.5 degrees. The km_per_degree conversion factor (111.32 km) is correct.
